productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men's Breathe Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print, flattened seam and printed labelFittingComfortWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Breathe deeply to rejuvenate your senses and induce deep relaxation. This light grey tee from urban yoga with the word "Breathe" and a seated yogi on the front will remind you to slow down and focus on your breathing every now and then. A stitched label has been carefully avoided and replaced with a printed label to provide comfort at its best. Seams around the sides have been flattened with special care to avoid abrasion. Team this t-shirt with yoga pants for a rejuvenating exercise session or pair it with jeans as casual wear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2”, Shoulders-19"
